# d2s_full_table.h

Generated lookup table. Do not edit by hand.

**Generated by:** `PrintDoubleLookupTable` from the upstream Ryu
sources at `github.com/ulfjack/ryu` (Boost/Apache dual license).
[from-comment] (`source/src/common/d2s_full_table.h:38-42`)
**Consumed by:** `src/common/d2s.c` — the Ryu `double → shortest
decimal` algorithm used for PG's float8 output.
[verified-by-code]
**Source data:** IEEE-754 double-precision constants, no Unicode
involvement.
**Regeneration:** Manual — the upstream Ryu generator is run
externally; the result is committed in-tree and then modified by
PG hackers per the header comment. Not built by the
`src/common/unicode/Makefile`.

Size: ~43 KB.
